name: Voting Breakdown
description: Vote tally breakdown with demographic slicing, comment distribution, and proportional visualizations for civic decisions and polling.

bars.description: Horizontal bar chart displaying vote percentages per option with color-coded fills and vote counts for standard results views

pie.description: Proportional pie/donut chart visualization emphasizing relative share of votes across options for at-a-glance results understanding

grouped.description: Grouped bars segmented by category (region, age, party) for comparative analysis across voter demographic slices

visual_brief: A vertical stack of horizontal bar rows displaying voting results. Each row has a fixed-width option label on the left (approximately 120px) showing the option text (e.g. 'Yes', 'No', 'Abstain'). The bar fills the remaining horizontal space with a colored fill proportional to vote percentage: yes=green (#10b981), no=red (#ef4444), abstain=neutral gray (#9ca3af). Percentage text and raw count appear on the right edge of each row (e.g. '62% (4,218)') in monospace semibold numerals. A demographic toggle group sits above the chart as a pill-shaped segmented control with options (Age, Region, Party, All). Selecting a toggle re-renders bars grouped or colored accordingly. Below each bar, expandable comment snippet boxes show 1-2 representative voter comments per option in italic muted text with quote marks, limited to 2 lines with 'show more' affordance. Overall vote total displays at top-right with turnout percentage. Bars have a subtle shimmer during initial load.

slots.demographic-toggle: Segmented control pill at top showing demographic slice options (Age, Region, Party, All). Active state highlighted with primary color.
slots.total-summary: Top-right summary showing total votes, turnout percentage, and timestamp of last update.
slots.vote-bar-row: Repeating row (d-row) containing option label, bar fill, and percentage text. Each row represents one vote option.
slots.option-label: Fixed-width label (120px) on left of row displaying the vote option text in semibold 14px type.
slots.bar-fill: Horizontal bar with animated fill width matching percentage. Color-coded by option semantic: success/destructive/neutral.
slots.percentage-text: Right-aligned monospace numeric showing percentage and raw count (e.g. '62% (4,218)').
slots.comment-snippet: Expandable box below each bar showing 1-2 representative comments in italic with quote marks. 2-line clamp with show-more affordance.

responsive.mobile: Option labels move above bars (stacked). Comment snippets collapse to count badge with expand-to-view. Demographic toggle scrolls horizontally. Pie preset stacks vertically.
responsive.tablet: Standard horizontal layout with condensed labels. Pie preset shows side-by-side.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with all elements visible and hover tooltips on bars showing detailed breakdown.

layout_hints.results_priority: Option labels, percentages, and counts should be readable in one quick scan before comments or demographic slicing deepen the interpretation.
layout_hints.toggle_role: Demographic toggles should clearly frame how the data is being sliced without overshadowing the actual vote results.
layout_hints.comment_support: Comment snippets are contextual evidence, not the main chart. Keep them visually subordinate to the tally bars.

layout_hints.results_priority: Option labels, percentages, and counts should be readable in one quick scan before comments or demographic slicing deepen the interpretation.
layout_hints.toggle_role: Demographic toggles should clearly frame how the data is being sliced without overshadowing the actual vote results.
layout_hints.comment_support: Comment snippets are contextual evidence, not the main chart. Keep them visually subordinate to the tally bars.

micro.bar-hover: bar outline highlight + tooltip fade-in 150ms ease-out

transitions.bar-fill-initial: width 0 to target 800ms ease-out staggered 100ms per bar

ambient.live-update-pulse: subtle counter tick animation when live results update

keyboard: Tab: cycle through bars and toggles
Enter: expand comment snippets for focused option
